channel.title: Facebook on adoption curve dot net
channel.description: Recent content in Facebook on adoption curve dot net

item.title: Creating and using test Facebook accounts
item.description: Facebook now allows you to create test users for application development purposes. That doesn’t sound too dramatic in and of itself, but up to now it’s been necessary to create dummy accounts and (technically) violate the terms of service. Creating new test accounts is a two stage process: firstly obtaining an access token for the application with which the account is to be associated; and then creating the account itself.

item.title: Creating Facebook events with the PHP SDK
Grabbing data from the Facebook API
item.description: One of the projects I’m currently working on needs has a large chunk of Facebook integration. It’s thrown up a couple of problems around groups and group permissions: the need to figure out which groups a user belongs to which of those groups the user has “write” permissions for. The Facebook API is a bit of a moving target with all the various updates and changes going on, and documentation is a bit sparse.
